name: bymax-mobile
description: Slash commands to boot the iOS Simulator (/bymax-mobile:sim-ios) and Android Emulator (/bymax-mobile:sim-android) for Expo / React Native projects. Auto-detects whether `expo start` (Metro reattach) or `expo run:ios|run:android` (full rebuild + install) is the right call. macOS-first; Android also works on Linux when the SDK is configured.
